trivia_bullets.text: Common from Modern Horizons 3 (MH3), released June 14, 2024 — a draft-innovation set bypassing Standard, injecting cards directly into Modern. Adapt originally appeared in Ravnica Allegiance (2019) as a Simic mechanic redesigned from Theros Monstrous; its presence on a black vampire is one of MH3's cross-guild mechanical transplants.

Artist Steve Ellis originally illustrated eleven MTG cards released 2007-08 through Morningtide, then left the game for twelve years. His return began with Ikoria showcase art in 2020; Dreamdrinker Vampire is one of six cards he illustrated for MH3.
sources: Hipstersofthecoast.com: Ikoria Showcase Art and Sketches by Steve Ellis Sell for $14,775
Scryfall artist search: Steve Ellis MH3

trivia_bullets.text: "The dream she tastes will be your last." — no speaker attributed.

Rated 2.0/5 in MH3 limited by MTG Arena Zone: 'a solid two drop that they can't just keep letting through because of the lifelink.' EDHREC rank 16,991 — minimal Commander adoption, consistent with its role as a draft common.
sources: MTG Arena Zone: MH3 Limited Set Review — Black
